metadata.name: Add an Endorsement to a Home Policy

description: A customer bought an expensive piece of jewelry and wants to add a scheduled personal property endorsement to their home policy to cover it.

nodes.task_description: Identify the policyholder and explain how a scheduled property endorsement works.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the customer's policy and clearly explains the benefit of the endorsement.

nodes.task_description: Collect the details of the jewelry, including a recent appraisal.

expected_outcome.value: Agent collects the required documentation for the high-value item.

nodes.task_description: Add the endorsement to the policy and calculate the additional premium.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully adds the endorsement and informs the customer of the cost.
